tests.title: Broken GPT-5.6 family stays hidden from model picker
tests.description: Verify broken GPT-5.6 Sol/Terra/Luna models are hidden and GPT-5.5 remains the default visible model.

steps.description: Log in as an admin user.
Open /admin/configuration/language-models.
Verify the default model is GPT-5.5.
Open /app and search GPT-5.6 in the model picker.
Verify no GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra, or Luna options are shown.

tests.title: Live LLM model picker streams real GPT-5.5 response
tests.description: Verify a normal user can select GPT-5.5 and receive a real streamed assistant response.

steps.description: Log in and open /app.
Select GPT-5.5 from the model picker.
Send a prompt asking for onyx-live-smoke exactly.
Verify the SSE body contains message_delta packets with onyx-live-smoke.
Verify the rendered assistant response contains onyx-live-smoke and no error banner.

tests.title: Multi-model picker sends multiple model overrides
tests.description: Verify adding a second model in the picker sends llm_overrides instead of a single llm_override.

steps.description: Create a temporary public provider/model through the frontend API.
Open /app and use the model picker add button to add the temporary model.
Send one chat message through the UI.
Verify the request payload has two llm_overrides: gpt-5.5 and the temporary model.
Delete the temporary provider.

tests.title: Authenticated core API endpoints stay healthy through frontend proxy
tests.description: Verify core user/admin /api endpoints return valid authenticated responses through localhost:3000.

steps.description: Log in with user credentials and query user-facing /api endpoints.
Verify /api/me, /api/settings, /api/llm/provider, sessions, personas, and notifications return valid shapes.
Log in with admin credentials and query admin /api endpoints.
Verify admin LLM/security/groups/MCP/tools/enterprise-settings endpoints return valid shapes.
Create a disposable chat session, mark it public, verify it appears in session listing, then delete it.
Verify chat-session create, share-status patch, list, and delete endpoints all succeed through /api.
Create a disposable Space/project, fetch it, fetch details/instructions, update instructions, pin it, rename it, then delete it.
Verify Space/project create, list, detail, instructions, pin, metadata update, and delete endpoints all succeed through /api.
Create a disposable assistant/persona, fetch it, share it publicly, update metadata, verify listing, then delete it.
Verify assistant/persona create, fetch, share, update, list, and delete endpoints all succeed through /api.

tests.title: Chat input core text submission behaviors stay working
tests.description: Verify basic chat input behaviors do not regress.

steps.description: Open /app with mocked chat endpoint.
Verify Enter and send button submit non-empty messages.
Verify empty and whitespace-only messages are not sent.
Verify input clears after send and long messages render.

tests.title: Authentication UI navigation smoke stays working
tests.description: Verify login redirect, successful login, and invalid-password error behavior.

steps.description: Open /app while unauthenticated.
Verify redirect to /auth/login.
Log in with valid credentials.
Verify chat opens and /api/me returns the user.
Submit an invalid password.
Verify Invalid email or password appears and URL stays on login.

tests.title: User and admin settings navigation pages render without app errors
tests.description: Verify high-value settings/admin pages render their headers and no app/server error text.

steps.description: Visit Profile, Chats, and Accounts settings pages.
Verify each user settings page has the expected visible header.
Visit Language Models, Security & Hardening, and Users admin pages.
Verify each admin page has the expected visible header and no error text.

tests.title: Chat search command menu finds sessions and projects
tests.description: Verify command-menu previews, filters, project search, and no-result state.

steps.description: Create temporary chat sessions and projects.
Open the chat search command menu.
Verify preview limits and filter/action entries render.
Verify project search finds a matching project and no-result search shows an empty state.
Delete temporary sessions/projects.

tests.title: Default-agent MCP UI switching and persistence
tests.description: Verify admin/default-agent MCP tool switching and visible basic-user actions remain stable.

steps.description: Create an API-key MCP server and attach tools to the default agent.
Verify a basic user sees and toggles MCP tools in chat actions.
Verify admin tool switch state persists after reload.

tests.title: Per-user MCP credential template gates tool availability
tests.description: Verify all per-user credential template fields are required before MCP tools become available.

steps.description: Create a per-user MCP server with api_key and username template fields.
Verify the user credentials modal shows both fields.
Verify save/update stay disabled until both fields are filled.

tests.title: Share chat modal creates and removes share link
tests.description: Verify a user can create a public share link for a chat and then make it private again.

steps.description: Log in and open /app.
Send a chat message through the UI with a mocked assistant response.
Open the share modal and choose organization/public sharing.
Verify PATCH body sets sharing_status public and the modal shows a /app/shared/ link.
Reopen sharing and choose Private.
Verify PATCH body sets sharing_status private and the modal closes.

tests.title: SharePoint source toggle forces internal search payload
tests.description: Verify enabling Sharepoint in chat source controls forces SearchTool and sends a Sharepoint source filter for the next prompt.

steps.description: Log in as admin and ensure SearchTool is enabled on the default assistant.
Open the chat action/source controls and enable the Sharepoint source toggle.
Send prompt: tell me about my company next holiday.
Verify the chat request payload contains forced_tool_id for SearchTool.
Verify internal_search_filters.source_type contains sharepoint.

tests.title: SharePoint search pipeline layered diagnostic stays healthy
tests.description: Checks indexed-sources, keyword retrieval, model server health (:9000), and the full /api/search pipeline in dependency order so a failure names the broken layer.

steps.description: Login as admin and assert sharepoint is in indexed sources.
Assert admin keyword search returns sharepoint docs for 'holiday'.
Assert the model server on :9000 is healthy.
Assert /api/search with a sharepoint filter returns results.

tests.title: Live SharePoint holiday prompt retrieves and cites internal documents
tests.description: Real end-user flow with live LLM: toggle Sharepoint source, send the holiday prompt, assert the stream contains sharepoint results, Sources renders, and 'No results found' never appears.

steps.description: Login, enable Sharepoint in the chat source controls.
Send the holiday prompt with no mocks.
Assert stream packets contain sharepoint documents and the UI shows Sources.

tests.title: All Onyx dev services stay up (doctor check)
tests.description: Supervisor-gap guard: docker infra, model server :9000, API :8080, celery workers (8+), and web proxy :3000; failures name the dead service and the heal command.

steps.description: Check each service in dependency order.
Fail naming the dead service; heal mode restarts tmux-managed services.

tests.title: Chat message feedback lifecycle works with live LLM
tests.description: Sends a real non-streaming chat message, creates thumbs-up feedback on the assistant message, removes it, deletes the session.

steps.description: Send a live chat message with tools disabled.
Create and then remove feedback on the assistant message.
Delete the chat session.

tests.title: OAuth MCP reauthentication keeps internal tools usable
tests.description: Opt-in: preflights MCP_OAUTH_* env vars and skips cleanly when unconfigured; when configured runs the full IdP login + reauth Playwright flow.

steps.description: Preflight MCP OAuth env; SKIP when absent.
Run mcp_oauth_flow.spec.ts when configured.

tests.title: Admin LLM provider CRUD leaves default model and hidden models untouched
tests.description: Creates, renames, lists, and deletes a throwaway LLM provider; asserts default_text stays gpt-5.5 and gpt-5.6-* stay hidden before and after.

steps.description: Create a provider with a fake key (never /test or /default).
Rename, list, verify basics list, delete in finally.
Assert protected default/hidden model state is unchanged.

tests.title: Custom OpenAPI tool validate, register, update, and delete lifecycle
tests.description: Validates a minimal OpenAPI 3 definition, registers it as a custom tool, lists/gets/updates it, deletes it in finally.

steps.description: Validate then create a custom tool.
List, get, and update it.
Delete in finally and assert it is gone.

tests.title: Document sets and input prompts CRUD round-trips cleanly
tests.description: Creates a document set against the zero-doc Ingestion API cc-pair, renames and deletes it (async-aware); input prompt create/list/get/patch/delete.

steps.description: Discover cc-pairs and pick the zero-doc pair.
Document set create/list/patch/delete with bounded sync waits.
Input prompt full CRUD with cleanup.

tests.title: Craft user library upload, tree, directory, and delete lifecycle
tests.description: Uploads a file into the Craft user library, asserts tree membership, creates a directory, deletes both in finally.

steps.description: Upload a small file via /api/build/user-library.
Assert tree membership by document_id; create a directory.
Delete both and assert removal.

tests.title: Admin user listing and own-preference round-trips stay healthy
tests.description: Paginated user listing with email filter, user counts, /api/me/permissions; pinned-assistants round-trip and same-value default-model write on the calling account only.

steps.description: List accepted users filtered by admin email.
Assert permissions shape.
Round-trip own pinned assistants; restore in finally.

tests.title: XLSX attachment answers data questions with live LLM
tests.description: Uploads the Foundations 2025 Production xlsx fixture, waits for processing, asks for Stewart Willis's 2025 amount, asserts $40,216,752.33 in the live answer with no missing-tool apology.

steps.description: Upload the xlsx fixture and wait for COMPLETED with chunks.
Ask the Stewart Willis question with the file attached.
Assert the exact amount is in the answer; cleanup session and file.

tests.title: Uploaded file formats finish processing (csv txt md json)
tests.description: Uploads small csv/txt/md/json files and asserts each reaches COMPLETED with chunks within 180s, naming the dead component on failure; deletes them after.

steps.description: Upload four small files of different formats.
Poll statuses until all COMPLETED.
Delete all uploaded files.

tests.title: Unreadable attachment is surfaced to the user instead of silent flailing
tests.description: A chat referencing an attachment that never finished processing must tell the user (still processing / failed, re-upload) instead of apologizing about missing tools or guessing.

steps.description: Upload the xlsx fixture and ask about it immediately while PROCESSING.
Assert the answer says the file is still being processed and contains no unreadable data.

tests.title: Chat sidebar lifecycle: create, rename, and delete a chat like a user
tests.description: Live-LLM UI flow: new chat appears in Recents with an auto-title, rename via sidebar, delete via sidebar.

steps.description: Send a live prompt in a new chat.
Rename the Recents entry to a unique name and assert it.
Delete from the sidebar and assert removal.

tests.title: Stop generation mid-stream then regenerate a fresh answer
tests.description: User stops a streaming answer, UI returns to sendable state, regenerate produces a fresh completed answer.

steps.description: Send a long-streaming prompt and click stop mid-stream.
Assert the input is sendable again, then regenerate.
Assert a fresh completed answer arrives.

tests.title: Agent created through the UI drives live answers with its system prompt
tests.description: Create an agent in the editor UI with a distinctive system prompt, chat with it, and assert the live answer obeys the prompt.

steps.description: Create an agent via /app/agents/create with a PINEAPPLE system prompt.
Start a chat with the agent and send a greeting.
Assert the answer contains PINEAPPLE; delete agent and chat.

tests.title: File attached via paperclip UI is answered with the exact figure
tests.description: The end-user xlsx flow: paperclip upload, processing chip clears, live answer contains the exact spreadsheet figure.

steps.description: Attach the fixture via paperclip and wait for processing to clear.
Ask the Stewart Willis question.
Assert the answer contains 40,216,752.33 and no missing-tool apology.

tests.title: XLSX inline preview renders a readable multi-column grid
tests.description: Visual QA with video: the inline spreadsheet preview shows sheet tabs and real data columns; regression for the single-column collapse caused by sizing the grid from a one-cell title row.

steps.description: Attach the fixture and send a message so the inline preview renders.
Assert sheet tabs, the Sum of AUM column, and >=2 measured column edges; record video.
